data.description:
## What
tests/scripts/ was 109 files flat (92 bash + 15 pytest + helpers). Reorganized:
- 92 bash characterization suites -> tests/scripts/suites/ (collector test_bash_suites.py scoped to suites/ + top-level, NOT a blanket rglob that would sweep fixture scripts).
- 5 bridge/jira pytest tests -> tests/scripts/bridge/.
- 8 reducer-API pytest tests -> tests/scripts/reducer/ (alongside the reducer split).
- bridge_test_helpers.py kept at tests/scripts/ root (on sys.path via conftest).
Top level now holds only the collector + test_ticket_unblock.py + subdirs.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [x] bash suites under suites/; collector finds all 92, excludes fixtures/
- [x] pytest tests grouped by subsystem (bridge/, reducer/); parents[2]->[3] anchors bumped
- [x] scripts tier count-neutral (383), moved tests green, 0 isolation-guard hits
data.title: Reorganize tests/scripts: bash suites -> suites/, pytest tests by subsystem
